title: Better Thumbnail Glint
description: Turns the Vanilla Glint into a better one for Thumbnails
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8cc20635f97a0ae39a7fa79e17d908c9692a0a9.png)
***
[![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1386629458944983050/1497206144769200159/New_Project1.png?ex=69ecad61&is=69eb5be1&hm=c0bbf2ba9e4cbe37c2229ecc6e0fb8b9f94004415f22d4887955b18143b32af4&=&format=webp&quality=lossless)](https://discord.com/invite/9qAHxDMcrX) [![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1386629458944983050/1497206145075646556/New_Project2.png?ex=69ecad61&is=69eb5be1&hm=7cb98cfceda85e461c215adf54feae712903436a9fe395ea893a5c68f07b5ae6&=&format=webp&quality=lossless)](https://www.youtube.com/@HuxTheBird)
***
### 📷✨ Thumbnails
Having a hard time making the glint for your thumbnails? Well this texture pack can help you!
You can adjust the Glint in your settings to the perfect level for your thumbnail

![Old vs New](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51c32932e4c38633ce07c23e18f745b8bb7b319b.png)
***
### ⚙️ Glint Settings
